title: phyllactis regularis
intro: Phyllactis regularis, also known as the "Coralroot" or "Phyllactis," is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phyllactis regularis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Phyllactis regularis can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
